# uptimekuma_notification_wpush (Resource)

WPush notification resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "uptimekuma_notification_wpush" "example" {
  name      = "WPush Notifications"
  api_key   = "your-wpush-api-key"
  channel   = "monitoring"
  is_active = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) WPush API key for authentication
- `name` (String) Notification name

### Optional

- `apply_existing` (Boolean)
- `channel` (String) WPush push channel identifier
- `is_active` (Boolean)
- `is_default` (Boolean)

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Notification identifier
